'''Nezmi''' was a location on [[Qiaxx]] known for its [[Bubble Cliffs]]. [[Black Nebula (organization)|Black Nebula]] owned a casino in Nezmi and was headquartered out of a secret base within the cliffs.

==Appearances==
*''[[Rebel Force: Renegade]]'' {{Mo}}
*[[Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand 5|''Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand'' 5]]
